# 🍪  Does your WordPress site secretly use cookies?

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-04-22 19:00:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 711

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Ever wondered if your WordPress site is using browser cookies
without you knowing about it? You're not alone.

Here's the thing: Most WordPress beginners don't know whether
their WordPress site is using cookies.

Unfortunately, this can lead to compliance issues and potential
fines... all because of something they never realize their site
is doing.

This is where a privacy compliance plugin, like WPConsent 
( http://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.VV5u5poee59tGUniqeSraF0rXd-RuH8og686aPkJdOg ) comes in.

Here's how WPConsent can help you.

- It helps you understand which cookies your website is using.

- Automatically prevents third-party scripts from setting
cookies.

- Create smart cookie consent banners with a few clicks.

- Store user consent data on your own server to maximize
privacy.

Get started with WPConsent today! ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.6uFPwwp8xrKNu4-iAaLD69GP1rNm6MohvfBRfAVUkKw )

Imagine knowing exactly what your site does behind the scenes.
With WPConsent, you can have the peace of mind knowing you're
fully compliant with privacy laws.

Talk soon,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
